steps.title: Look for forest recovery
steps.content: The blank must provide graph evidence for natural regrowth after the mid-1980s. Evidence of regrowth should show forest cover increasing after the period of heavy conversion to cattle pasture.

steps.title: Reject data that miss regrowth
steps.content: Choice A gives a one-year similarity, not growth. Choice B describes an earlier decrease. Choice C gives a single comparison in 2000. The remaining choice states that forest cover increased for all classes from 1979 to 2000, directly supporting regrowth. The answer is D.
